tasks.label: live-test-asistanapp
tasks.command: cd "/Users/busenurakdeniz/Desktop/ilk projem" && dotnet run --project AsistanApp/AsistanApp.csproj > /tmp/asistan_live_test.log 2>&1 & app_pid=$! && sleep 8 && login=$(curl -s -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:5007/api/elderly/login" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"elderly@test.com","password":"1234"}') && echo "LOGIN_RESPONSE:$login" && token=$(printf '%s' "$login" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('token',''))") && if [ -z "$token" ]; then echo "TOKEN_PARSE:FAILED"; else echo "TOKEN_PARSE:OK"; fi && code_sub=$(curl -s -o /tmp/sub.json -w "%{http_code}" "http://127.0.0.1:5007/api/subscription?token=$token") && echo "SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS:$code_sub" && code_emg=$(curl -s -o /tmp/emergency.json -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:5007/api/emergency-alert?token=$token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"location":"41.0082,28.9784","coords":{"latitude":41.0082,"longitude":28.9784}}') && echo "EMERGENCY_STATUS:$code_emg" && echo "SUBSCRIPTION_BODY:$(cat /tmp/sub.json)" && echo "EMERGENCY_BODY:$(cat /tmp/emergency.json)" && kill $app_pid && wait $app_pid 2>/dev/null || true

tasks.label: live-test-python
tasks.command:
cd "/Users/busenurakdeniz/Desktop/ilk projem" && dotnet run --project AsistanApp/AsistanApp.csproj > /tmp/asistan_live_test_py.log 2>&1 & app_pid=$! && sleep 8 && python3 - <<'PY'
import json, urllib.request

def post(url, payload, token=None):
    data = json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8')
    headers = {'Content-Type':'application/json'}
    if token:
        headers['Authorization'] = f'Bearer {token}'
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers=headers)
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as r:
        return r.getcode(), r.read().decode('utf-8')

def get(url, token=None):
    headers = {}
    if token:
        headers['Authorization'] = f'Bearer {token}'
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as r:
        return r.getcode(), r.read().decode('utf-8')

base = 'http://127.0.0.1:5007'
code, body = post(base + '/api/elderly/login', {'email':'elderly@test.com','password':'123'})
print('LOGIN_STATUS:', code)
print('LOGIN_BODY:', body)
obj = json.loads(body)
token = obj.get('token','')
print('TOKEN_PRESENT:', bool(token))
code2, body2 = get(base + '/api/subscription', token=token)
print('SUB_STATUS:', code2)
print('SUB_BODY:', body2)
code3, body3 = post(base + '/api/emergency-alert', {'location':'41.0082,28.9784','coords':{'latitude':41.0082,'longitude':28.9784}}, token=token)
print('EMERGENCY_STATUS:', code3)
print('EMERGENCY_BODY:', body3)
PY
kill $app_pid && wait $app_pid 2>/dev/null || true

tasks.label: railway-enroll-login-smoke
tasks.command: base="https://safeguardian-elderly-safety-emergency-support-ap-production.up.railway.app"; email="railway.test.$(date +%s)@example.com"; pass="Test123!"; payload=$(printf '{"deviceId":"ios-%s","fullName":"Railway Test User","phone":"+905551234567","email":"%s","birthDate":"1948-05-10","bloodType":"A+","password":"%s","emergencyContact1Name":"Test Aile","emergencyContact1Phone":"+905551234568"}' "$(date +%s)" "$email" "$pass"); enroll=$(curl -k -s -X POST "$base/api/elderly-self-enroll" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "$payload"); echo "ENROLL:$enroll"; login=$(curl -k -s -X POST "$base/api/elderly/login" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"email\":\"$email\",\"password\":\"$pass\"}"); echo "LOGIN:$login"; token=$(printf '%s' "$login" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("token",""))' 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$token" ]; then echo "TOKEN:OK"; code_sub=$(curl -k -s -o /tmp/rail_sub.txt -w '%{http_code}' -H "Authorization: Bearer $token" "$base/api/subscription"); echo "SUB_STATUS:$code_sub"; cat /tmp/rail_sub.txt; else echo "TOKEN:EMPTY"; fi

tasks.label: railway-emergency-smoke
tasks.command: base="https://safeguardian-elderly-safety-emergency-support-ap-production.up.railway.app"; email="railway.test.$(date +%s)@example.com"; pass="Test123!"; payload=$(printf '{"deviceId":"ios-%s","fullName":"Railway Test User","phone":"+905551234567","email":"%s","birthDate":"1948-05-10","bloodType":"A+","password":"%s","emergencyContact1Name":"Test Aile","emergencyContact1Phone":"+905551234568"}' "$(date +%s)" "$email" "$pass"); curl -k -s -X POST "$base/api/elderly-self-enroll" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "$payload" >/tmp/rail_enroll3.txt; login=$(curl -k -s -X POST "$base/api/elderly/login" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"email\":\"$email\",\"password\":\"$pass\"}"); token=$(printf '%s' "$login" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("token",""))' 2>/dev/null || true); echo "TOKEN_OK:$([ -n "$token" ] && echo yes || echo no)"; code_emg=$(curl -k -s -o /tmp/rail_emg3.txt -w '%{http_code}' -X POST "$base/api/emergency-alert" -H "Authorization: Bearer $token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"location":"41.0082,28.9784","coords":{"latitude":41.0082,"longitude":28.9784}}'); echo "EMG_STATUS:$code_emg"; cat /tmp/rail_emg3.txt

tasks.label: appstore-endpoint-suite
tasks.command: base="https://safeguardian-elderly-safety-emergency-support-ap-production.up.railway.app"; echo ROOT:$(curl -k -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "$base/"); echo HEALTH_LIVE:$(curl -k -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "$base/health/live"); echo SUB:$(curl -k -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "$base/api/subscription?token=dummy"); echo SUB_CANCEL:$(curl -k -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X POST "$base/api/subscription/cancel?token=dummy" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{}'); echo MOOD_SAVE:$(curl -k -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X POST "$base/api/mood?token=dummy" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"moodScore":7}'); echo MOOD_ANALYSIS:$(curl -k -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "$base/api/mood-analysis?token=dummy"); echo HEALTHREC_SAVE:$(curl -k -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X POST "$base/api/health-records?token=dummy" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"recordType":"tansiyon","value":12,"unit":"mmHg"}'); echo HEALTHREC_LIST:$(curl -k -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "$base/api/health-records?token=dummy"); echo MED_ADD:$(curl -k -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X POST "$base/api/medications?token=dummy" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Aspirin","notes":"test","scheduleTimes":["09:00"]}'); echo MED_LIST:$(curl -k -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "$base/api/medications?token=dummy"); echo FAMILY_LAST:$(curl -k -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "$base/api/family/last-contact?token=dummy"); echo ELDERLY_ACCOUNT_DELETE:$(curl -k -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X DELETE "$base/api/elderly/account?token=dummy" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"password":"123"}')
